entries.key: Scores are only available while using default settings.
entries.value: 只有使用默认设置时才会记录成绩。

entries.key: Activity settings are controlled by the host.
Environment settings are controlled by the host.
Gamepads, joysticks, and HOTAS are all supported! You can view and customize controls in [Game Settings -> Controls]
entries.value: 支持手柄、摇杆和 HOTAS！你可以在 [游戏设置 -> 控制] 中查看并自定义操作。

entries.key: Press [Escape] to open the menu. There's a lot of stuff you can do in this game. Here are some key features, that's why they're at the top!
entries.value: 按 [Escape] 打开菜单。这个游戏里能做的事情很多，下面是几个重要功能，所以它们放在最上面！

entries.key: Press [T] to toggle the Activation Panel. From there you can enable weapon systems by clicking on [AIR-TO-AIR] or [AIR-TO-GND]. Press [Spacebar] to fire guns and [Left Alt] to fire a missile after acquiring a lock on your target.
entries.value: 按 [T] 切换激活面板。你可以在其中点击 [AIR-TO-AIR] 或 [AIR-TO-GND] 启用武器系统。锁定目标后，按 [Spacebar] 开火，按 [Left Alt] 发射导弹。
警告：正在接近限制空域！

entries.key: Allow players to copy your craft
entries.value: 允许其他玩家复制你的载具

entries.key:
Look at your hands to see the controls for flying. If you ever want to see them again, you can find the controls button in the pop-up menu under settings.

You can adjust your view by moving your hands close together and then holding the grab button on both controllers. Then move your hands to change your view.

Enjoy your flight!
entries.value:
看向你的双手即可查看飞行控制。如果之后还想再看一次，可以在弹出菜单的设置中找到控制按钮。

你可以调整视角：先将双手靠近，然后同时按住两个控制器上的抓取按钮，再移动双手改变视角。

祝你飞行愉快！
自动驾驶已启用：机翼水平模式

entries.key: Show/hide flight gizmos for wings, propellers, etc
entries.value: 显示/隐藏机翼、螺旋桨等飞行辅助显示

entries.key: Better grab something agile, this race will have you scratching the cliffs of the complex terrain around the Bannock peninsula.
entries.value: 最好选一台灵活的载具，这场比赛会让你贴着班诺克半岛复杂地形中的峭壁飞驰。

entries.key: Reloads your craft at your current position. Shortcut: Ctrl + R
entries.value: 在当前位置重新加载载具。 快捷键：Ctrl + R
进入/离开飞机 快捷键：N

entries.key: Select tags used to filter the list of craft
entries.value: 选择用于筛选载具列表的标签
生成一架 AI 飞机

entries.key: Start an activity by yourself or with friends
entries.value: 独自或与好友开始活动

entries.key: Reloads your craft at your starting position. Shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + R
entries.value: 在起始位置重新加载载具。 快捷键：Ctrl + Shift + R

entries.key: Repositions and uprights your craft at your current position. Shortcut: Ctrl + F
entries.value: 在当前位置重新摆正并扶正载具。 快捷键：Ctrl + F

entries.key: Chad got some stocks on a window manufacturing company, let's aid the market cracking some windows around Vetusta by zooming between its buildings.
entries.value: Chad 买了些窗户制造公司的股票。让我们在 Vetusta 的楼宇之间高速穿梭，顺手帮市场砸开几扇窗吧。

entries.key: This craft file was hand edited by its author to make use of features that are not directly supported in the game. Many advanced players use XML-modding to work around limitations in the game to enable really cool functionality that would otherwise not be possible. It is perfectly safe to pilot, but modifying this craft yourself may reset their special properties or cause unexpected behavior.
entries.value: 该载具文件由作者手动编辑，以使用游戏内并未直接支持的功能。许多高级玩家会通过 XML 修改绕过游戏限制，实现原本无法做到的酷炫功能。驾驶它是安全的，但如果你自行修改该载具，可能会重置这些特殊属性或导致意外行为。
显示/隐藏风力设置面板。

entries.key: A fast race with smooth turns chasing the rails at Bannock, with an exciting end.
entries.value: 一场沿着班诺克铁轨飞驰的高速比赛，弯道流畅，结尾刺激。
选择下一个目标 快捷键：Tab, ]

entries.key: Exits the flight scene back to the main menu.
entries.value: 退出飞行场景并返回主菜单。

entries.key: Show Activation Panel Shortcut: T, Right Shift
entries.value: 显示激活面板 快捷键：T, Right Shift

entries.key: Show Instrument Panel Shortcut: T, Right Shift
entries.value: 显示仪表面板 快捷键：T, Right Shift
该载具使用了 XML 修改。

entries.key: Soundtrack created with love by Fat Bard
entries.value: 原声音乐由 Fat Bard 用心创作

entries.key: Current throttle Shortcut: Left Shift, Left Control
entries.value: 当前油门 快捷键：Left Shift, Left Control

entries.key: Show when an aircraft is loaded, if it has instructions.
entries.value: 如果载具带有说明，则在载入时显示。

entries.key: This craft file was hand edited by its author to make use of features that are not directly supported in the game. Many advanced players use XML-modding to work around limitations in the game to enable really cool functionality that would otherwise not be possible. It is perfectly safe to pilot, but modifying this craft yourself may reset their special properties or cause unexpected behavior.\n\n
entries.value: 该载具文件由作者手动编辑，以使用游戏内并未直接支持的功能。许多高级玩家会通过 XML 修改绕过游戏限制，实现原本无法做到的酷炫功能。驾驶它是安全的，但如果你自行修改该载具，可能会重置这些特殊属性或导致意外行为。
